name: The Noble Quran
short_description: This is a digital version of The Noble Quran with full vocal recitation and various translations. Enjoy listening to the message of Allah as it is fully recited and translated for all to experience.
detailed_description:
The Noble Quran now on Steam!

This is a digital version of The Noble Quran, the book of Islam followed by all Muslims that has been revealed in the Arabic language to the prophet Muhammad (Peace be upon him) as the final message to humanity from Allah SWT.

This digital rendition features the entire Quran and translated into several languages. It features various features such as text highlighting, bookmarks, and easy switching between languages and several Islamic themed achievements that can be displayed on your account, which are unlocked after 2 hours of time played.  

The full verbal recitation will be added as an update in the future, we are currently working on getting our own verbal recitation to feature within the game and are using the purchases to fund it!

لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّٰهُ

supported_languages:
English, German, Arabic*, Indonesian, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Bangla, Hindi, Punjabi (Gurmukhi), Urdu
*languages with full audio support
